creator: vrachil@gmail.com
text:
I have bought a Supermicro LSI AOC-USAS2-L8e controller and sadly the
system does not recognize it. I am running a stock freebsd 8.1-release
installation (GENERIC kernel, and no changes to any files).

the output of pciconf -lv:
http://pastebin.com/beSpF3y6

dmesg:
http://pastebin.com/yE45gpa2

From a quick google search, I see that the device is not supported.
If a developer is willing to write the kernel module for this device,
I am willing to test it.
